title: Archaeologists Found an Ancient Roman Military Camp Hiding 7,000 Feet High in the Sky
description: Archaeologists found a 2,000-year-old Roman camp 7,000 feet up in the Swiss Alps, with sling bullets from the Roman 3rd Legion.

title: Kenatha Kanom Streams on JioHotstar Soon: Know About This Fossil Comedy

title: If students want to understand politics, they should start with Ancient Rome
description: The Roman Republic fell roughly 2,000 years ago — the culmination of a series of events including Julius Caesar's assassination 2,069 years ago today. Yet the republic's ruin still influences how we engage in politics today. As a student who has spent the past five years studying Latin and Roman history, I was surprised by...

title: Skeleton crew: How a Comox Valley fossil discovery changed paleontology in B.C.
description: When he shook hands with the amateur fossil hunter in 1988, Richard Hebda, head of botany at the Royal B.C. Museum, was not expecting much.
